channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Thursday, June 4, 2026
item.description: Today's most consequential signal for you, Midya, is PM Carney's federal AI strategy announcement — it will shape funding flows, institutional mandates, and consulting opportunities across every Canadian university you're targeting. Pair that with the Council of Ontario Universit...
